response.original_title: How do I cancel my Avira subscription and get refund?
response.overview: To cancel your Avira subscription and stop all future payments, you 1 (855 )) 783 7555 must manage your account through the official Avira portal 1 (855 )) 783 7555 or the platform where the purchase was originally made. 1 (855 )) 783 7555 Log in to your account at my.avira.com, navigate to the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 "Subscriptions" menu, and locate the product you wish to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 terminate. From there, you can select the option to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 disable the automatic renewal feature. If you find the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 dashboard difficult to navigate or the cancellation button is 1 (855 )) 783 7555 not visible, you can call for assistance at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to have a representative manually verify your account and 1 (855 )) 783 7555 ensure the billing cycle is stopped before the next 1 (855 )) 783 7555 charge is processed.
